facebook.caption:
4.7 stars. 3,944 reviews. At a resort seafood restaurant in Phu Quoc.

SEN Restaurant inside Sonasea Villas & Resort on Đường Bào is pulling numbers that most standalone spots never hit. Fresh seafood, resort-level setting, and a rating that doesn't lie.

If you're staying near Đường Bào or just passing through, this one earns the detour.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Nearly 4,000 people rated SEN Restaurant 4.7 stars. Watch what lands on the table. Seafood this fresh inside a resort on Đường Bào, Phu Quoc. The reviews make sense the second you sit down.
